installCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@9.15.1 --activate && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

headers.value: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), interest-cohort=(), browsing-topics=(), payment=(), usb=(), magnetometer=(), accelerometer=(), gyroscope=(), clipboard-read=(), clipboard-write=(), screen-wake-lock=(), xr-spatial-tracking=(), bluetooth=(), hid=(), serial=(), midi=(), encrypted-media=()

default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.posthog.com https://*.sentry-cdn.com https://*.sentry.io https://js.sentry-cdn.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:3000 http://127.0.0.1:3000 https://*.sentry.io https://*.ingest.sentry.io https://*.posthog.com https://api.openclaw.com https://api.sergeant.app https://api.sergeantapp.com wss: ws:; worker-src 'self' blob:; manifest-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; object-src 'none'; report-uri https://api.sergeant.app/api/csp-report; report-to csp-endpoint
